sql_array: CREATE TABLE urls (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url URL);
INSERT INTO urls (id, url) VALUES (1, sys.newurl('https', 'usr@www.a.com:123', 'docs/index.html'));
UPDATE urls SET url = sys.newurl('http', 'user@newdomain.org', 'products/item.pdf') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT url FROM urls WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO urls (id, url) VALUES (2, sys.newurl('ftp', 'ftp.server.com', 'files/resource.zip'));
